basics.name: Luis E. Marrero González
basics.label: Software Developer | Data & Automation
basics.summary: Software developer with experience building modern web applications, working with data, and improving processes through technology. Skilled in TypeScript, Astro, React, Python, SQL, Excel, and Git/GitHub. Strong foundation in computer science fundamentals, problem-solving, debugging, data organization, and collaborative development. Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science while gaining hands-on experience in reporting, data collection, operational analysis, and technology-driven projects.

work.name: Holberton School
work.summary: Provided technical assistance in C, Python, Linux, and programming fundamentals through debugging sessions, code reviews, and one-on-one explanations.

Explained technical concepts clearly to help students understand errors, improve code quality, and develop problem-solving skills.
Collaborated with instructional staff to support learning objectives.
